name: Briargate Farmers' Market

Products.value: Fresh produce, dairy products, homemade bread, seasonal Palisade peaches, handmade jewelry, crafted wood items, Pampered Chef, microgreens, mushrooms, dog treats, locally ground coffee, and more (about 35 vendors)

Address.value: 7610 North Union Blvd, Colorado Springs, CO 80920

notes: On-file record had no website or Facebook. Found the market's official operator site, Colorado Springs Farmer's Markets (springsfarmersmarkets.com), which runs both the Briargate and Cordera markets; used the /northern-springs page which covers Briargate specifically. Season/hours given for 2026: Wed 9am-2pm, May 27-Sept 30. Contact phone/email are the operator's general contact (shared with Cordera market), not Briargate-exclusive, but appear to be the correct point of contact. A separate 'facebook.com/briargatefarmersmarket' page exists in search results but is not linked from the official site, so it was not used; the site's own linked Facebook is facebook.com/springsfm. No mention found of SNAP/EBT, ADA accessibility, or certified organic status, so those fields were omitted. Instagram not found.
